title: Error: cannot find newuidmap: exec: "newuidmap": executable file not found in $PATH
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

/kind bug

**Description**

I cannot run any podman command anymore.
It just errors with the error described below and in the title.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

I don't know what I've changed. I've changed nothing.
Just run ` podman version`.

Maybe the cause could be I did not properly shut down the system due to some other errors, so some file is corrupted? I have no idea.

Also toolbox obviously fails, when podman fails.

**Describe the results you received:**

```
$ toolbox -vvv     
DEBU Running as real user ID 1000                 
DEBU Resolved absolute path to the executable as /usr/bin/toolbox 
DEBU Running on a cgroups v2 host                 
DEBU Checking if /etc/subgid and /etc/subuid have entries for user rugk 
DEBU TOOLBOX_PATH is /usr/bin/toolbox             
DEBU Toolbox config directory is /var/home/rugk/.config/toolbox 
Error: failed to get the Podman version
$ podman version
Error: cannot find newuidmap: exec: "newuidmap": executable file not found in $PATH
``` 

**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

does not work, of course, but this **does work**:
```
$ podman -v             
podman version 2.2.1
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
$ podman info --debug
Error: cannot find newuidmap: exec: "newuidmap": executable file not found in $PATH
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
$ rpm -q podman     
Warnung: Found bdb Packages database while attempting sqlite backend: using bdb backend.
podman-2.2.1-1.fc33.x86_64

```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes, it is the latest one.

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Fedora 33 Silverblue
ostree://fedora:fedora/33/x86_64/silverblue
Version: 33.20210131.0 (2021-01-31T00:50:07Z)
BaseCommit: b12a7c80c806f371c35ad54f5205c7f995f587a975d0994e193793f21c7ac8bc

comments.body: Is the `newuidmap` binary available? What's the output of `which newuidmap`?

This looks like for some reason shadow-utils is not installed or not installed correctly
rpm -qV shadow-utils

```

/usr/bin/newuidmap
```
